title: Insolvency practitioner sanctions: Dylan Quail 18 February 2025
body: "This Order is made in relation to a complaint that Dylan Quail, in his role as supervisor of an Individual Voluntary Arrangement (‘IVA’), breached the fundamental principle of Professional Competence and Due Care of the Insolvency Code of Ethics, when he took approximately 15 months to issue a certificate of completion following the full and final settlement of the IVA. "
